user.title: Configure GeoZones Mirror
user.description:
Set up a high-performance geometric tracker mirror. This integration maps your custom device telemetry coordinates against a GeoJSON file (standard `.geojson` or `.json` files formatted as GeoJSON work perfectly), automatically prioritizing overlapping boundaries by the smallest surface area footprint.

You can input a web URL endpoint or use a local file path relative to your Home Assistant installation root directory.

data_description.geojson_source: e.g., domain.com/zones.json or a local path like /config/geozones/sweden.geojson

error.processing_failed: The provided GeoJSON file is unreachable, structurally malformed, or breaks limits verification checks (max 2,500 zones or 250,000 vertices).

abort.already_configured: This device tracker instance is already being mirrored by a GeoZones entry mapping configuration.

init.title: Reconfigure GeoZones Settings
init.description: Modify parameters or switch tracking file sources for this active device tracking mirror instance. Standard `.geojson` or `.json` files formatted as GeoJSON are supported.

data_description.geojson_source: e.g., domain.com/zones.json or a local path like /config/geozones/sweden.geojson

error.processing_failed: The provided GeoJSON file is unreachable, structurally malformed, or breaks limits verification checks (max 2,500 zones or 250,000 vertices).
